rows.name: South Carolina Commission for the Blind
rows.constituent: South Carolinians who are blind or have low vision
rows.mandate: Governs vocational rehabilitation and independent-living services for blind South Carolinians. Seven members — one per congressional district, three legally blind — governor-appointed with Senate consent (S.C. Code 43-25-10).

rows.name: South Carolina State Housing Finance and Development Authority
rows.mandate: Oversees SC Housing's affordable-housing finance programs. Nine commissioners — seven governor-appointed with Senate consent plus two ex officio (S.C. Code Title 31, Ch. 13).
rows.criticalNote: Inventory listing — apply any time · 7 of 9 seats are governor-appointed
